description_long: This is a modern sledgehammer with a long, straight handle and a robust, double-sided rectangular head. The handle appears to be made of a dark, possibly composite or fiberglass material, and is capped with a small knob at the end for grip security. The hammer head is substantial, featuring two large, flat striking faces and a central yellow marking or insert, likely for visibility or branding. The head is attached securely to the handle, with no visible fasteners or separations. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and effective force delivery. The color scheme is primarily black with yellow highlights, giving it a professional and industrial appearance.
description: A modern sledgehammer with a long black handle and a large, double-sided rectangular head featuring yellow highlights. The design is robust and industrial, suitable for heavy-duty urban tasks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of the handle and the thickness of the hammer head.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the full width of the double-sided rectangular head and the yellow central marking.
description_view_2: Angled side view highlighting the attachment between the handle and the head, as well as the depth of the striking faces.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view displaying the symmetry of the head and the length of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight fiberglass handle with a black, grippy surface and a rounded end knob for secure handling.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided rectangular sledgehammer head with two large flat striking faces and a central yellow marking.
